source: Huntr 2025 Annual Job Search Trends Report

medianTimeToFirstOffer.note: Median time from start of search to first offer. Lengthened throughout 2025.

applicationVolume.note: Typical job seeker submits ~16 apps/week. Most offers come from 10-20 targeted applications.

applicationToInterviewDays.note: Days from application to first interview callback.

interviewToOfferDays.note: Days from interview to offer decision.

resumeCustomizationImpact.note: Tailored resumes convert 50% higher than generic ones.

conversionRatesByPlatform.note: Interview conversion rate by job platform (% of applications that lead to interviews).

referralVsColdApply.note: Referrals yield 5-10x higher conversion rates than cold applications. Based on Granovetter (1973) and Wanberg et al. (2020).

overallFunnel.note: Approximate industry averages. Varies significantly by seniority, role type, and market conditions.
